prompt:
Commit and PR two small changes already made on main:

1. client/src/store.ts — added Caffeine (Cups) as default metric m12 (0 to 5+, order 11)
2. client/e2e/app-loads.spec.ts — added Caffeine to the expected metrics list, updated comment to say 12

The changes are on these two files in the repo at ~/hack/measure. Copy them into your worktree (read from ~/hack/measure/client/src/store.ts and ~/hack/measure/client/e2e/app-loads.spec.ts), verify lint and build pass, then create a PR titled 'Add Caffeine as default metric'
